component.name: Proton Drive
component.summary: End-to-end encrypted cloud storage for Linux

description.p: Proton Drive keeps your files synchronised between your computer and Proton's encrypted servers. Files are encrypted before they leave your device, so nobody but you can read them.
This package provides the sync daemon (protond), a command-line client (proton-drive), and a graphical user interface (proton-gui).
Initial release with sync, CLI, GUI, and system tray support.
